title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Gangavalli constituency traders demand building for State’s second largest vegetable market
description: Farming is the primary occupation of the people in the constituency, which also houses dozens of sago mills. Tapioca is cultivated on over 700 hectares, corn (400 hectares), turmeric (300 hectares) and paddy (100 hectares). Sugarcane is cultivated in large scale in Thalaivasal, Veeraganur, and Tammampatti.
